# get webhook signing secret, regenerating if requested

GET https://api.jambonz.cloud/v1/Accounts/{AccountSid}/WebhookSecret

Reference: https://docs.jambonz.org/reference/rest-platform-management/accounts/get-webhook-secret

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: get webhook signing secret, regenerating if requested
  version: endpoint_accounts.getWebhookSecret
paths:
  /Accounts/{AccountSid}/WebhookSecret:
    get:
      operationId: get-webhook-secret
      summary: get webhook signing secret, regenerating if requested
      parameters:
        - name: AccountSid
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: secret
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  webhook_secret:
                    type: string
```
